sample.Description: Onset of the event expressed in samples relative to the start of the recording (sampling frequency 256 Hz).

type.Description: Class of the event as written by the acquisition software. All events in this dataset are of type 'trigger' (stimulus or phase marker).

value.Description: Numeric trigger code written by the stimulus-presentation software. See the dataset README for the full code book: codes 1-9 indicate which one of the symbols on screen was activated; code 101 marks the beginning of a block; codes 200-203 mark the boundaries between the Fixation, Target Presentation, Preparation, Stimulation and Rest phases (the Stimulation phase has a distinct start and end marker).
